goal: Add database columns and update JPA entities to support penalty tracking, payment marking, and configurable compounding

tasks.name: Liquibase Migrations
tasks.action: Create 3 Liquibase migrations: (1) Add paid, paid_at, schedule_id to loan_penalties and total_penalties to loan_applications; (2) Add compounding to penalty_rules; (3) Seed SystemConfig with loan.penalty.grace_period_days=30 and loan.penalty.default_threshold_days=90

tasks.name: Update JPA Entities
tasks.action: Add paid (Boolean, default false), paidAt (Instant), scheduleId (UUID) to LoanPenalty. Add totalPenalties (BigDecimal, default ZERO) to LoanApplication. Add compounding (boolean, default false) to PenaltyRule.

tasks.name: Add LoanPenaltyRepository Query Methods
tasks.action: Add findByLoanIdAndPaidFalse(UUID), findByLoanIdAndScheduleId(UUID, UUID), and @Query for sumAmountByLoanIdAndPaidFalse(UUID) to LoanPenaltyRepository

commitMessage: feat(loan-penalty): schema and entity changes for penalty tracking
